sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86417" key="proagora/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προᾰγορ-άζω</orth>, <sense id="n86417.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">buy beforehand, forestall,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.37.19.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
